prompt:
A sleek, futuristic electric hypercar is parked at a compact curbside charging pedestal, its smooth body lines and aerodynamic profile highlighted by soft reflections. Through the driver-side window or on a narrow dashboard display visible from outside, a stylized battery icon shows a charge level around four out of five segments, clearly suggesting roughly 80% charge without any readable numbers or text. A thin charging cable connects the car to the pedestal, and subtle lighting under the car’s sill hints at advanced Fully Supervised Driving hardware.

The setting is a near-future solarpunk city street at golden hour, with clean pavement, greenery integrated into building facades, and soft ambient light. The 512×512 image is photorealistic with gentle stylization, no brand logos or readable text on the vehicle or charger, and a composition that centers the car and its implied 80% battery status while the surrounding smart-city environment remains softly blurred in the background.
